name: Holiday Almond Wreaths
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup EGG BEATERS Cholesterol-Free - 99% Real Egg Product, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed, beat the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg product and almond extract; beat well.
3. Stir in the flour and ground almonds.
4. Using a pastry bag with a 1/2-inch star tip, pipe dough into 1 1/2-inch wreaths, 2 inches apart, on ungreased baking sheets.
5. Decorate wreaths with red and green candied cherries if desired.
6. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes or until light golden brown.
7. Cool on wire racks.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
